instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `cube-and-square` that evaluates an expression once and binds its cube and square to user-named variables for use in body.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 (COMPUTE)))
            (LET ((C (* #:G1 #:G1 #:G1)) (S (* #:G1 #:G1)))
              (LIST C S)))
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 (COMPUTE)))
            (LET ((C (* #:G112 #:G112 #:G112)) (S (* #:G112 #:G112)))
              (LIST C S)))

--- stderr ---
